source.name: wordfreq
source.redistribution: Derived ranks may be redistributed with attribution and share-alike notice

familyPolicy.status: frequency-seeded; every scored anchor requires human review
familyPolicy.inflections: conservative rule-based grouping plus explicit irregular forms
familyPolicy.transparentDerivations: candidate grouping only; false merges are corrected during expert review
familyPolicy.multiwordChunks: mapped to component families; never counted as an extra word family
familyPolicy.properNouns: excluded by lowercase source filtering unless explicitly reviewed later
familyPolicy.numbers: excluded from the 20K family count and handled separately
